LanguageData.Bulldog_MainTurret.description: A large, long range cannon capable of firing explosive shells over medium distance. Usually mounted on Bulldog tanks.
LanguageData.Bulldog_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single shot
LanguageData.Bulldog_MainTurret.label: bulldog cannon
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret.description: A lightly-armored medium range flamethrower turret usually mounted on bunsen tanks. Takes fuel directly from the chemtank of the vehicle. Quite devastating against infantry, bunsen flamethrower struggles against armored targets.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: fire spew
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret.label: bunsen flamethrower
LanguageData.Highwayman_MainTurret.description: A lightly-armored twin-linked miniturret cannon. Usually mounted on Highwaymen armored personnel carriers. Needs to be reloaded with steel. Can only fire over short range, but doesn’t have any issues with firing at enemies that engage the vehicle in melee.
LanguageData.Highwayman_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: burst
LanguageData.Highwayman_MainTurret.label: highwayman turret
LanguageData.Roadkill_MainTurret.description: A cannon capable of firing explosive tank shells over medium distance. Usually mounted on Roadkill tanks. Needs to be reloaded with steel. Can’t fire whilst moving. Has a decent range, but can’t target enemies too close.
LanguageData.Roadkill_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single shot
LanguageData.Roadkill_MainTurret.label: roadkill cannon
LanguageData.Scytheman_MainTurret.description: An inaccurate launcher capable of firing two barrages of rockets covering a large area. The turret does not fire until someone orders it to fire. It is very effective against large groups of weaker combatants, but less effective against small numbers of armored targets. Extensive firing may overheat and disable the turret.
LanguageData.Scytheman_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: burst
LanguageData.Scytheman_MainTurret.label: rocket swarm turret
LanguageData.Tango_MainTurret.description: A heavy automatic turret mounted on a Tango APC. Its large-caliber shells do heavy damage over significant ranges, but it’s inaccurate and uses up a lot of ammo.
LanguageData.Tango_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single
LanguageData.Tango_MainTurret.fireModes.1.label: burst
LanguageData.Tango_MainTurret.label: tango autocannon
LanguageData.Toad_MainTurret.description: A mortar turret that launches all kinds of shells, typically mounted on Toad siege pods. While it can inflict devastating damage, the mortar's inherent inaccuracy makes it more useful for attacking large fortifications than groups of enemies in the field.
LanguageData.Toad_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single
LanguageData.Toad_MainTurret.label: toad artillery
LanguageData.Badger_MainTurret.description: A powerful turret mounted on a Badger Infantry Fighting Vehicle. Its explosive shots deal significant damage to enemy infantry, but it’s low armor-piercing makes it subpar against armored targets, and it uses up a lot of ammo.
LanguageData.Badger_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single
LanguageData.Badger_MainTurret.fireModes.1.label: burst
LanguageData.Badger_MainTurret.label: badger chain gun
LanguageData.Burya_MainTurret.description: A powerful multiple launch rocket system usually mounted on Burya, capable of firing powerful barrages of rockets covering a large area. The turret does not fire until someone orders it to fire. It is very effective against large groups of weaker combatants, but less effective against small numbers of armored targets. Extensive firing may overheat and disable the turret.
LanguageData.Burya_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: burst
LanguageData.Burya_MainTurret.fireModes.1.label: single
LanguageData.Burya_MainTurret.label: rocket swarm turret
LanguageData.Goliath_MilitaryTurret.description: A military-grade double barreled automatic turret, usually mounted on Goliath siegepods. Requires steel to refurbish its barrels after heavy use. May explode when damaged. It has a limited angle it can fire in.
LanguageData.Goliath_MilitaryTurret.fireModes.0.label: burst
LanguageData.Goliath_MilitaryTurret.label: goliath military turret
LanguageData.Goliath_SwarmTurret.description: An inaccurate launcher capable of firing two barrages of rockets covering a large area. The turret does not fire until someone orders it to fire. It is very effective against large groups of weaker combatants, but less effective against small numbers of armored targets. Extensive firing may overheat and disable the turret.
LanguageData.Goliath_SwarmTurret.fireModes.0.label: burst
LanguageData.Goliath_SwarmTurret.label: goliath artillery
LanguageData.Marshal_MainTurret.description: A large and powerful tank cannon capable of firing explosive shells over long distance. Usually mounted on Marshal tanks.
LanguageData.Marshal_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single
LanguageData.Marshal_MainTurret.label: main turret
LanguageData.Marshal_MountedTurret.description: A small machine gun mounted on a marshal tank. Needs to be reloaded with steel. Can only fire over short range, but doesn’t have any issues with firing at enemies that engage the vehicle in melee.
LanguageData.Marshal_MountedTurret.fireModes.0.label: burst
LanguageData.Marshal_MountedTurret.label: mounted turret
LanguageData.Paladin_MainTurret.description: A smoke grenade launcher mounted on a Paladin LAV. Excellent for providing smoke cover to infantry, this turret has no offensive capabilities.
LanguageData.Paladin_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single
LanguageData.Paladin_MainTurret.fireModes.1.label: burst
LanguageData.Paladin_MainTurret.label: paladin smoke grenade launcher
LanguageData.Udar_MainTurret.description: A gigantic artillery capable of firing various kinds of shells over medium distances. Whilst it cannot fire to different world tiles, the fact that it is mounted on an armored mobile platform gives it great versatility. It can only rotate 35 degrees in both directions. Usually mounted on Udar artillery.
LanguageData.Udar_MainTurret.fireModes.0.label: single
LanguageData.Udar_MainTurret.label: udar artillery
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret_Launcher.descripti: A lightly-armored long range inferno launcher turret sometimes mounted on bunsen tanks. Takes fuel directly from the chemtank of the vehicle. Quite devastating against infantry, bunsen inferno launcher struggles against armored targets.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret_Launcher.label: long barrel flamethrower
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret_Long.description: A lightly-armored long range flamethrower turret usually mounted on bunsen tanks. Takes fuel directly from the chemtank of the vehicle. Quite devastating against infantry, bunsen flamethrower struggles against armored targets.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret_Long.label: long barrel flamethrower
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret_Short.description: A lightly-armored close range flamethrower turret usually mounted on bunsen tanks. Takes fuel directly from the chemtank of the vehicle. Quite devastating against infantry, bunsen flamethrower struggles against armored targets.
LanguageData.VVE_Bunsen_MainTurret_Short.label: long barrel flamethrower
LanguageData.Prowler_MiniTurret.description: A small gun turret mounted on a prowler explorer vehicle. Only capable of firing single-shots. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use.
LanguageData.Prowler_MiniTurret.fireModes.0.label: single shot
LanguageData.Prowler_MiniTurret.label: mounted turret
LanguageData.Roadkill_MainTurret_LongBarrel.label: roadkill cannon
LanguageData.Roadkill_MainTurret_ShortBarrel.label: roadkill cannon
